case_title: JONATHAN T. RODRIGUEZ ET AL VS. LUGG INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-11-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUGG INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, JONATHAN T. SURSO, KATHRYN A. AS TO DEFENDANT LUGG INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, JONATHAN T. SURSO, KATHRYN A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUGG INC. $1,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,195.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,150.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, JONATHAN T. SURSO, KATHRYN A. AS TO DEFENDANT LUGG INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
